title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 300.550 - Commercial vehicles prohibited from using certain streets
text:
300.550.  Commercial vehicles prohibited from using certain streets. — In cases where an equally direct and convenient alternate route is provided, an ordinance may describe and signs may be erected giving notice thereof, that no persons shall operate any commercial vehicle upon streets or parts of streets so described except those commercial vehicles making deliveries thereon.
(L. 1965 p. 445 § 141)
